name: treasures-finance-agent-skills
description: Official Claude Code skills for building AI agents on the Treasures finance APIs.

plugins.name: treasures-finance-agent-skills
plugins.description: Agent skills for the Treasures finance APIs: the public B2B API (discover tokenized stocks, quote/execute trades, bridge USDC across Solana and Ethereum, read portfolio + trade history) and delegated wallets (onboard, quote, async buys/sells, balances, API keys).
